◎译　　名　十二岁的女孩们
◎片　　名　Girls at 12
◎年　　代　1975
◎产　　地　美国
◎类　　别　纪录片 / 短片
◎语　　言　英语
◎豆瓣评分　0/10 from 0 users
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/35265513/
◎片　　长　30分钟
◎导　　演　乔斯·肖普拉 Joyce Chopra

◎简　　介  

　　The camera goes to live among a group of 12‐year‐old girls in a middle‐class New England neighborhood. It accompanies them to school, goes to their slumber parties, listens to their gossip about their largely incorporeal boy friends, buys clothes with them and interviews them, their teachers and their parents.
introduction: The camera goes to live among a group of 12‐year‐old girls in a middle‐class New England neighborhood. It accompanies them to school, goes to their slumber parties, listens to their gossip about their largely incorporeal boy friends, buys clothes with them and interviews them, their teachers and their parents.
